openai/whisper-large-v3-turbo.description: OpenAI Whisper large v3 turbo via DeepInfra's OpenAI-compatible transcription API

limits.notes: DeepInfra publishes OpenAI-compatible speech-to-text routes and model pages for whisper-large-v3 and whisper-large-v3-turbo, but current public docs do not publish fixed multipart upload or duration caps for the OpenAI-compatible transcription endpoint. AutoShow therefore keeps v1 split policy metadata notes-only and relies on retry-with-split when the provider rejects an oversized payload.
